title: 原因副詞子句 because / since / as

formulas.zh: 因為…，所以…（從屬子句在前）

explanation: because 語氣最直接，提供充分理由，可單獨回答 Why 問句；since/as 語氣較弱，表示已知或附帶原因。三者皆為從屬連接詞，引導原因子句。關鍵注意：不可同時使用 because...so...，這屬於雙連接詞錯誤。from屬介詞，不可直接接 S + V 結構。從屬子句可位於主句前或後，位於前需加逗號分隔。

examples.eng: Because she studied hard, she passed the difficult exam easily.
examples.chi: 因為她用功念書，她輕鬆地通過了這場困難的考試。

examples.eng: Since you don't understand the problem, let me explain it again.
examples.chi: 既然你不理解這個問題，讓我再解釋一次。

examples.eng: The event was cancelled because the weather was too bad.
examples.chi: 因為天氣太差，活動被取消了。

examples.eng: As everyone was tired, the teacher decided to end the class early.
examples.chi: 由於大家都很疲倦，老師決定提早結束課程。

extension.tip: 判斷原因強弱：why 問句直接用 because 回答；已知事實或順序說明用 since/as。避免誤用「because...so...」，記住 because 已含因果關係，不需重複 so。可按原因重要性選詞：because（最重）> since ≥ as（較輕）。

examples.test: ❌ Because he was late, so he missed the bus.
examples.result: → ❌ 雙連接詞錯誤。正確：Because he was late, he missed the bus. 或 He missed the bus because he was late.

examples.test: ❌ She didn't go from she was ill.
examples.result: → ❌ from 是介詞不能接子句。正確：She didn't go because/since she was ill.

examples.test: ✓ Why did you leave? —Because I had another appointment.
examples.result: → ✓ because 單獨回答 why 問句，最自然。

extension.note: 記口訣：『because 強、since/as 弱；因為不能雙連接；子句前加逗號分。』

parts: the project is important, we must finish it on time.
exercises.sentence: Because the project is important, we must finish it on time.
exercises.translation: 因為這個專案很重要，我們必須按時完成它。

exercises.sentence: The meeting was postponed since most members were absent.
exercises.translation: 既然大多數成員缺席，會議就被延期了。

parts: you are interested in art, you should visit the museum.
exercises.sentence: As you are interested in art, you should visit the museum.
exercises.translation: 由於你對藝術感興趣，你應該去參觀博物館。

exercises.sentence: She couldn't attend the concert because she had to work late.
exercises.translation: 她無法參加音樂會，因為她必須工作到很晚。

parts: she missed the morning bus, she arrived at school late.
blanks: So she arrived at school late 或 she was late to school
exercises.sentence: Because she missed the morning bus, she arrived at school late.
exercises.translation: 因為她錯過了早班公車，所以她上學遲到了。

exercises.sentence: We should leave now because there is heavy traffic ahead.
exercises.translation: 我們現在應該離開，因為前面交通擁堵。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇最適當的原因連接詞填空，句子表示直接充分的理由
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ the weather was terrible, we decided to cancel the outdoor concert.
mc_exercises.explanation: 本題需填入原因副詞子句的連接詞。Because 語氣最直接，提供充分理由，適合回答「為什麼要取消演唱會」的問題。B 項 Although 表讓步，C 項 However 為副詞/連接副詞，D 項 Therefore 為結果，均不符題意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷句子結構是否正確，選出有錯誤的選項

options.text: Since you have finished your homework, you can play video games now.
We stayed home because the snow was heavy so we couldn't drive safely.
As the company faced financial difficulties, it decided to reduce its workforce.
Because she wasn't feeling well, she went to see a doctor immediately.

mc_exercises.explanation: B 項犯了「雙連接詞錯誤」，同時使用了 because 和 so，違反句型規則。Because 和 so 不能同時出現在一句話中。A、C、D 三項句構正確，because/since/as 均正確使用於原因子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 根據語境選擇合適的原因連接詞，注意語氣差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ most employees already know the company's new policy, I won't explain it in detail during today's meeting.
mc_exercises.explanation: 本題語境中，「員工已知新政策」是既定事實（已知原因），故應用 Since 或 As，語氣較弱。B 項 Since 最佳。A 項 Because 語氣過強，過度強調理由。D 項 For 為介詞，不能直接接 S + V 結構。C 項 As 亦可，但 Since 在此語境更常用。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複合考題：判斷句子結構並選擇語法最正確的版本
mc_exercises.question_eng: Which sentence demonstrates CORRECT usage of a causal clause?

options.text: From the economic recession being severe, the government implemented emergency measures.
As we arrived late at the conference, because the traffic was congested, we missed the opening speech.
Since the research data proved inconclusive, the scientists decided to conduct further experiments.
Due to the new technology, so the production efficiency increased significantly.

mc_exercises.explanation: C 項正確，Since 引導原因子句，句構合法。A 項錯誤，From 為介詞，不能接 S + V 結構，應改為 Because/Since。B 項錯誤，重複使用連接詞（As + because），屬結構重疊。D 項錯誤，Due to 後接名詞，不能同時用 so，產生雙連接詞錯誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇適當的原因連接詞填入空格，表示直接明確的原因
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ she missed the bus, she arrived at school late.
mc_exercises.explanation: 因為題目要求表示直接明確的原因（她遲到的主要原因是錯過公車），應用 because 語氣最強。Since 表已知理由，as 表附帶理由，語氣較弱，不符。So 是結果連接詞，不能用於原因子句。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的原因連接詞和語序，完成因果句
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ you have already finished your homework, you can go out to play with your friends.
mc_exercises.explanation: 此句表達已知或顯而易知的原因（你已完成功課是眾所周知的事實），應用 since。Because 語氣太強不適合已知事實，so 和 therefore 是結果連接詞，不能引導原因子句。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 因為明天要考試，所以今晚我必須早點睡覺。
translation_exercises.answer: Because there is an exam tomorrow, I must go to bed early tonight. / I must go to bed early tonight because there is an exam tomorrow.
key_points: Because + S + V 引導原因
there is an exam tomorrow（有考試）
must go to bed early（必須早睡）
hints: 提示1：Because 語氣直接，可單獨回答 Why 問句；原因子句可置於句首或句尾
提示2：句首位置需用逗號分隔；避免使用 because...so... 雙連接詞結構

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 既然你已經完成了功課，就可以去和朋友打籃球。
translation_exercises.answer: Since you have already finished your homework, you can go to play basketball with your friends. / You can go to play basketball with your friends since you have already finished your homework.
key_points: Since + S + V 表示已知或前提條件
have finished your homework（完成功課）
can go to play basketball（可以去打籃球）
hints: 提示1：Since 語氣較弱，表示雙方都知道的事實或已確定的條件；可置於句首或句尾
提示2：注意現在完成式 have finished 的使用；句首需加逗號；不能寫成 since...so...

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 由於空氣品質不良，政府要求所有學校暫停室外運動課程。
translation_exercises.answer: As the air quality is poor, the government requires all schools to suspend outdoor PE classes. / The government requires all schools to suspend outdoor PE classes as the air quality is poor.
key_points: As + S + V 表示附帶或明顯的原因
air quality is poor（空氣品質不良）
suspend outdoor PE classes（暫停室外體育課）
hints: 提示1：As 語氣較弱，表示附帶或顯而易見的原因；句首需加逗號，句尾無需逗號
提示2：注意 require + O + to V 的用法；避免混淆 because/since/as 三者；不可使用 from 代替 as

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 因為智慧型手機使用時間過長，許多青少年面臨視力下降和頸椎問題的困擾。
translation_exercises.answer: Because smartphones are used for too long, many teenagers face problems such as vision decline and cervical spine issues. / Many teenagers face problems such as vision decline and cervical spine issues because smartphones are used for too long.
key_points: Because + S + V 引導明確的因果關係
are used for too long（使用時間過長）
face problems such as...（面臨...困擾）
hints: 提示1：複雜句型中，Because 後可接較複雜的子句結構；主句包含多重信息時，邏輯要清晰
提示2：避免誤用 because...so... 或 from + 名詞；注意 such as 的用法；若從句在首位，逗號不可省

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 因為明天有英文考試，所以我今晚必須認真讀書。
translation_exercises.answer: Because there is an English exam tomorrow, I have to study hard tonight. / I have to study hard tonight because there is an English exam tomorrow.
key_points: There is an English exam tomorrow
hints: 提示1：because 子句可置於句首（後接逗號）或句尾，主句結構保持不變
提示2：不要使用『Because... so...』的雙重連接詞，因為語意重複

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 既然你已經完成作業，就可以去和朋友玩了。
translation_exercises.answer: Since you have already finished your homework, you can go play with your friends. / You can go play with your friends since you have already finished your homework.
key_points: since 表已知或顯而易知的原因
hints: 提示1：since 語氣弱於 because，常用於雙方都認可的事實；子句可前可後
提示2：注意完成式 have finished 的使用，強調動作已完成
